name: USD Partners LP
summary: USD Partners LP (USDP) is a master limited partnership that provides terminalling services for crude oil and biofuels. The company operates terminal facilities where it offers storage and throughput services, primarily for crude oil. It serves customers seeking capacity at its terminals and generates revenue through terminalling service contracts with upstream producers, refineries, and related businesses.

products.name: Crude Oil Terminalling Services
products.description: Storage and throughput terminalling services for crude oil at company-operated terminal facilities.

products.name: Biofuels Terminalling Services
products.description: Terminalling services for biofuels at company-operated terminal facilities.

partnerships.description: Sole direct subsidiary of USD; serves as sponsor of USD Partners LP.
Energy Capital Partners III, LP and related investment vehicles affiliated with the partnership.
The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. and its affiliates are referenced in relation to the partnership.
